attempts.strategy: Build iso `iterated ≅ (pullback j).obj M` from two pullbackComp pseudofunctor coherences chained via ≪≫, then transport P1 keystone IsIso fromTildeΓ across it with isIso_fromTildeΓ_of_iso

attempts.lean_error: (initial) Application type mismatch: (pullback j).obj M has type (Spec Γ(...)).Modules but expected (Spec (CommRingCat...)).Modules — HOU failure; then 'failed to synthesize IsIso ...fromTildeΓ' on TC route
attempts.insight: ≫ is right-associative so iso order is (pullback A).mapIso ((pullbackComp B C).app M) ≪≫ (pullbackComp A (B≫C)).app M. fromTildeΓ must use explicit @form over Γ(...) to avoid HOU. The [IsIso ·.fromTildeΓ] instance is in nested-obj form vs e's ⋙/.comp form — TC won't match; pass positionally via @isIso_fromTildeΓ_of_iso _ _ _ e (proof) so a term-mode defeq check succeeds.

findings.blocker: Three coupled ring-identification bridges (engineering, not math): (1) S vs Γ(Spec S,⊤) reconciliation through Scheme.ΓSpecIso — the working σ must be composite (ΓSpecIso S).symm ≪≫ gammaImageRingEquiv j ⊤, and gamma_image_iso_semilinear_top must produce semilinearity over THAT composite (genuine hard core: how modulesSpecToSheaf re-bases along ΓSpecIso); (2) A = Γ(Spec R, D(s)) as an R-algebra via restriction-map .hom.toAlgebra + scalar tower, with hf : σ f' = algebraMap R A f holding by rfl; (3) h.restrictScalars R vs the Hfr ModuleCat R .hom — final IsLocalizedModule transport across that identification.

attempts.strategy: Not attempted as compiling code — judged a large coupled ~200-400 LOC build, half-finishing it risked a broken assembly. Documented the precise 3-bridge plan instead.
attempts.insight: TOP is NOT a trivial assembly: its sole input is a genuine geometry build whose obstruction is the S-vs-Γ(Spec S,⊤) structure-sheaf re-basing through ΓSpecIso. No LLM API key in env (GEMINI_CLI_* are IDE-server vars, not GEMINI_API_KEY).

next_steps: Next prover: (i) define σ : S ≃+* A as composite via ΓSpecIso + gammaImageRingEquiv; (ii) build Algebra R A / scalar tower via restriction-map .toAlgebra (producer d flocus_section_scalar_tower); (iii) prove (c) gamma_image_iso_semilinear_top over the composite σ; (iv) assemble TOP via isLocalizedModule_powers_transport. Then keystone isLocalizedModule_basicOpen_descent + gap1 isIso_fromTildeΓ_of_isQuasicoherent are one-liners.
